body_transformation: The turtle-like body retains its rounded silhouette and low stance, now rendered in deep violet translucent skin revealing swirling crimson mist energy currents beneath. The pale blue shell accents transform into a cracked, hollowed-out structure of ebony black with ghostly white mist seeping through its fractures. The curled tail tip dissolves into wispy shadowy vapour trailing behind, while the short stubby legs appear slightly translucent with faint energy ripples distorting the air around them. The beige underbelly becomes a pale silver semi-transparent layer showing internal mist patterns.
signature_feature: Shell: hollowed ebony black with ghostly white mist seeping through fractured edges.
